Journal Article · Journal of Hazardous Materials, 459, 132112

Enhanced Uranium Separation by Charge Enabling gamma-MnO2 with Oxygen Vacancies

Shuang Zhang, Fan Yang, Xiaohui Cao, Yong Tang, Taiqi Yin, Tao Bo, Yunhai Liu, Grzegorz Lisak, Naoki Kano, Bing Na*, Mengyu Chang*, Yuhui Liu*

DOI Paper Code Slides

Abstract

A study of charge-enabled gamma-MnO2 with oxygen vacancies for enhanced uranium separation.

Highlights

  • Corresponding-author work on uranium separation.
  • Examines oxygen-vacancy-enabled gamma-MnO2 materials.

Add separation-performance metrics and mechanistic notes here.

Citation

Shuang Zhang et al. Enhanced Uranium Separation by Charge Enabling gamma-MnO2 with Oxygen Vacancies. J. Hazard. Mater. 2023, 459, 132112.
